Professional Summary

Senior Java Full Stack Developer with 6+ years of experience building and supporting enterprise-grade applications across different domains. Strong expertise in Java 11/17, Spring Boot, microservices, REST APIs, and modern front-end development using React and Angular. Hands-on experience deploying cloud-native applications on AWS and Azure using Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines. Proven ability to deliver secure, scalable systems, modernize legacy platforms, and support high-traffic production environments in Agile teams.

Technical Skills

Java and Backend: Java 8/11/17, Spring Boot, Spring MVC, Spring Data JPA, REST APIs, SOAP APIs, Hibernate, Microservices, Apache Kafka, GraphQL

Frontend: React, Next.js, Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript, Redux Toolkit, Zustand, React Query, HTML5, CSS3/SCSS, Tailwind, Material UI

Databases: Oracle, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, PL/SQL

Security: Spring Security, OAuth2, JWT, RBAC, OWASP

Work Experience

Java Full Stack Developer – Enterprise Mobility, USA | 04/2025 – Present
  • Developed and supported 10+ full-stack applications using Java, Spring Boot, TypeScript, and React, maintaining high code quality through unit testing, debugging, peer reviews, and continuous refactoring.
  • Designed and implemented scalable RESTful and GraphQL APIs, optimizing data flow and improving performance of core business features through clean service-layer architecture.
  • Implemented frontend state management using Redux Toolkit and Zustand, and optimized API consumption using React Query to improve UI responsiveness and reduce redundant network calls.
  • Strengthened UI reliability by writing component and integration tests using React Testing Library, improving regression stability across critical workflows.
  • Owned end-to-end delivery of enhancements and fixes, performing root-cause analysis for production defects and ensuring stable, reusable solutions.
  • Served as primary on-call engineer and release coordinator, managing incident triage, cross-team communication, and monthly deployments with minimal service disruption.
Java Full Stack Developer – Staples, USA | 11/2024 – 03/2025
  • Implemented secure employee/ops access for TSC and Hi Touch using Spring Boot, Spring Security, OAuth2, JWT, and RBAC, supporting both single-tenant and multi-tenant flows.
  • Delivered inventory and reorder-tracking UI features using Angular and React/Next.js, building reusable components with Material UI and Tailwind CSS for consistent user experience.
  • Strengthened reliability of login, approvals, and reorder workflows by adding unit tests with Jest and Jasmine, improving regression coverage across critical screens.
  • Built multi-stage inventory notification and approval lifecycle logic using Oracle PL/SQL and backend services for better order status visibility.
  • Created Excel bulk upload and reporting utilities using Apache POI + Spring Boot, validating employee/inventory data and tuning Oracle SQL to improve response time by approximately 30% in key reports.
  • Improved release consistency by supporting CI/CD with Jenkins, PowerShell automation, and Bitbucket/Git workflows.
Java Full Stack Developer – Verizon, USA | 11/2022 – 05/2024
  • Built Spring Boot microservices for catering order processing, menu customization, inventory control, and payment integration, exposing REST and SOAP APIs to support the self-service Verde Catering portal.
  • Integrated backend services with React + TypeScript UI flows and a Node.js Express layer, enabling students and faculty to place orders, schedule events, and track fulfillment through responsive web screens.
  • Improved peak-time performance by approximately 30% through Spring Data JPA query tuning, caching strategies, and MySQL access-pattern optimization.
  • Secured the platform using JWT, OAuth, and RBAC, reducing common web vulnerabilities through structured validation, input sanitization, and secure coding controls.
  • Increased reliability through automated backend testing using JUnit and Mockito and validated integrations using Postman.
  • Collaborated with stakeholders to convert operational workflows into structured JIRA user stories.
Java Full Stack Developer – MPHASIS LIMITED, India | 02/2021 – 07/2022
  • Built and enhanced Spring Boot / Spring MVC backend services and REST APIs to support internal banking workflows and dashboards.
  • Implemented data persistence using Hibernate/JPA with Oracle, including query tuning and routine bug fixes to improve reliability.
  • Developed and updated UI modules using Angular, HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript, integrating with backend endpoints.
  • Worked on integration flows using Apache Camel and ActiveMQ, applying routing, transformation, and error-handling patterns.
  • Assisted with event/message processing using Kafka by consuming published events and updating downstream services.
  • Performed API testing with Postman, participated in Agile ceremonies and code reviews, and supported releases through Jenkins pipelines.
Java Full Stack Developer – Cougar Tech, India | 08/2019 – 01/2021
  • Built and enhanced Spring Boot / Spring MVC REST APIs for a hospital patient portal covering appointments, patient registration, and visit history.
  • Implemented doctor availability scheduling, appointment booking/rescheduling, and notification triggers through service integration.
  • Developed billing and payment-related backend flows and integrated portal screens with backend services in coordination with the UI team.
  • Enabled lab reports/results viewing by integrating with internal lab systems via REST/SOAP endpoints.
  • Implemented healthcare-grade security practices including RBAC, JWT-based session handling, input validation, audit-friendly logging, and secure API design.
  • Supported testing and releases by writing JUnit/Mockito unit tests, validating APIs with Postman, fixing production defects, and participating in Agile ceremonies.
